picks.quote: That stuff ain't going to work against against the best heavyweight in the world. Like if what if he comes into the fight with the with the hand block stuff, Usyk is going to do what he pleases.
I think Usyk's probably going to wash Rico... I don't think this is going to be very competitive.
As a guy as a kickboxer, he's always going to be up against the guy who's a master at boxing. I don't think he's got a chance at all.
Alexander Usyk is still undefeated and I believe nobody can beat him.
Rico's got it he's got a he's he's got it all to do there, because it's uh it's another sport. It's a different sport altogether
Rico may discover very fast that fighting an elite boxing technician like Usyk is completely different from anything he's dealt with before
Usyk's technical brilliance should still be enough to keep him in control of the fight.
